label: Rippling HR
description: Connect to Rippling's HRIS API to read employee records, payroll data, benefits, and org structure.

form.title: Connect Rippling HR
form.subtitle: Authorize Anton to access your Rippling HRIS data via OAuth 2.0.

methods.label: OAuth 2.0 (Bring Your Own App)
methods.description: Create a custom OAuth app in Rippling, then paste your Client ID and Secret here. Anton will open a browser window for authorization — no passwords stored.
methods.how_to:
## Connect Rippling HR via OAuth 2.0

Rippling requires you to register a custom OAuth app in your account before authorizing. This takes about 2 minutes.

### 1. Create an OAuth app in Rippling

1. Log in to [app.rippling.com](https://app.rippling.com) as an admin.
2. Go to **Settings** (bottom-left gear icon) → **API** → **OAuth Apps**.
3. Click **Create App**.
4. Give it a name like `Anton Integration` and set the **Redirect URI** to `http://127.0.0.1` (Anton uses a local redirect to capture the auth code).
5. Under **Scopes**, enable at minimum: `employees:read`, `companies:read`, `groups:read`, `departments:read`. Add others as needed.
6. Click **Save**.

### 2. Copy your credentials

1. After saving, Rippling shows your **Client ID** and **Client Secret**.
2. The client secret is shown once — copy it immediately.

### 3. Paste into Anton

1. Enter the **Client ID** and **Client Secret** in the fields below.
2. Click **Submit**. Anton will open a browser window pointing to Rippling's consent screen.
3. Approve the requested scopes. Rippling redirects back to Anton and stores your access and refresh tokens locally.

### Notes

- If your Rippling plan does not include API access, the **API** section may not appear in Settings. Contact Rippling support to enable it.
- To revoke access later, go to **Settings → API → OAuth Apps** in Rippling and delete the app.

fields.name: client_id
fields.label: Client ID
fields.description: Found in Rippling → Settings → API → OAuth Apps after creating your app.

fields.name: client_secret
fields.label: Client Secret
fields.placeholder: Paste your Rippling OAuth client secret
fields.description: Shown once when you create the app in Rippling. Store it securely — Anton encrypts it locally.
